description: Fourth-slice fixture closeout and next queue selection

decision_notes: The fourth-slice Royal Paladin recipe can be used as an offline runtime/test fixture.
The fixture is main-deck-only; G Zone and Stride runtime remain disabled.
The fixture is not a saved player deck and is not automatically visible in UI.
Bot/playbook runtime use still needs a separate gate.

next_queue.title: Fourth Fixture Consumption and Four-Fixture Scale Gate
next_queue.goal: Validate how the fourth runtime fixture can be consumed safely, export reviewable deck text, then decide whether the fixture set is ready for another scale step.

tasks.title: Fourth fixture schema validator
tasks.goal: Validate the Royal Paladin runtime fixture independently from the M49 generator.

tasks.title: Fourth fixture deck text exporter
tasks.goal: Export the Royal Paladin fixture as reviewable count-line deck text without adding it to saved decks.

tasks.title: Fourth fixture headless load smoke
tasks.goal: Load the Royal Paladin fixture through offline/headless paths without UI, bot, G Zone, or Stride mutation.

tasks.title: Four-fixture scale decision
tasks.goal: Review Nova Grappler, Oracle Think Tank, Bermuda Triangle, and Royal Paladin fixture evidence before selecting any further slice.
